response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frameworks like React. His background in enterprise tooling, AI agent development, and cloud platforms aligns well with the role's requirements. His open-source contributions and leadership in technical workshops further highlight his expertise and collaborative mindset.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest).
Proven track record in AI agent development and enterprise automation tooling, directly relevant to the role.
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership, including workshops and talks on advanced topics.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, a key framework in the job description.
Experience with Kotlin/Java is secondary and less emphasized in recent roles.
German language proficiency is basic, though English fluency is strong.
